digest_method: sha256 over canonical JSON of the `vectors` array: json.dumps(doc['vectors'], sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':')) encoded utf-8 (NOT the SHA of the vectors.json file bytes)

families.base: minimal vectors that define each axis
families.ca_: coding-agent vectors that exercise each axis on file/command/tool/network/pack evidence

non_claims: This manifest attests the provenance and content-address of the spec-owned vector SET only. It is NOT a claim about any agent's behavior, safety, or compliance, and NOT an external-party reproduction. The vectors stay 'candidate' until a different author or organisation reproduces them from inputs alone. The vectors are spec-owned and independently producible: any program that emits the same canonical bytes yields the same digest, so no single generator is the required path.
